subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the love of God! Thy letter dated the 9th of Rabi'u'th-Thani 1323, which thou hadst dispatched [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر محبت الله نامه ای که بتاریخ ۹ ربیع الثانی ١۳۲۳ ارسال نموده بودی در
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @unity in diversity, @consolation and comfort, @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
